headline: Netflix sees more prospects for live events in South Korea after BTS
summary: Netflix  anticipates more opportunities for live events in South Korea, the company said on ‌Friday, as the U.S. streaming platform prepares to livestream ‌a highly anticipated BTS comeback concert in Seoul.  At a press conference, Brandon Riegg, ​Netflix's vice president of nonfiction series and sports, added that the company's investment in Korea would continue to grow, saying that they hoped the BTS event on Saturday would be "a spectacle unlike anything ‌we've seen before."

content.title: Netflix sees more prospects for live events in South Korea after BTS
content.summary: Netflix  anticipates more opportunities for live events in South Korea, the company said on ‌Friday, as the U.S. streaming platform prepares to livestream ‌a highly anticipated BTS comeback concert in Seoul.  At a press conference, Brandon Riegg, ​Netflix's vice president of nonfiction series and sports, added that the company's investment in Korea would continue to grow, saying that they hoped the BTS event on Saturday would be "a spectacle unlike anything ‌we've seen before."

thumbnail.caption: K-pop sensation BTS holds "BTS The Comeback Live Arirang" concert in Seoul

headline: Netflix says BTS concert in South Korea could herald stream of live events
summary: U.S. streaming platform Netflix anticipates more opportunities for live events in South Korea, a company official said on Friday, as it prepares for its biggest livestream this year, a highly anticipated BTS comeback concert ‌in Seoul.  The one-hour event, to be streamed live to 190 countries in the company's first global broadcast of a music ‌concert, marks the release of the supergroup's first new album in more than three years, and the start of a global tour in April.  Netflix hopes Saturday's BTS event in Seoul's ​historic Gwanghwamun Square will be "a spectacle unlike anything we've seen before," said Brandon Riegg, its vice president of nonfiction series and sports.

content.title: Netflix says BTS concert in South Korea could herald stream of live events

Netflix hopes Saturday's BTS event in Seoul's ​historic Gwanghwamun Square will be "a spectacle unlike anything we've seen before," said Brandon Riegg, its vice president of nonfiction series and sports.

headline: Is Netflix a Buy, Sell, or Hold in 2026?
summary: The failed bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery's streaming assets, film studio, and intellectual property has lots of investors asking, "What now?"

content.title: Is Netflix a Buy, Sell, or Hold in 2026?

headline: Disney's growth playbook: What will take center stage?
summary: Disney's (DIS) new CEO, Josh D'Amaro, outlined the company's next era on Wednesday. MoffettNathanson senior analyst Robert Fishman sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to explain why the streaming and a strong content slate are key for Disney's growth.

content.title: Disney's growth playbook: What will take center stage?
content.description:
Disney's (DIS) new CEO, Josh D'Amaro, outlined the company's next era on Wednesday.

MoffettNathanson senior analyst Robert Fishman sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to explain why the streaming and a strong content slate are key for Disney's growth.
content.summary: Disney's (DIS) new CEO, Josh D'Amaro, outlined the company's next era on Wednesday. MoffettNathanson senior analyst Robert Fishman sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to explain why the streaming and a strong content slate are key for Disney's growth.
